_source: nfa0 = euro area net IIP as % of GDP, end-2025 (Q4 2025). REAL data: ECB official statistical release 'Euro area quarterly balance of payments and international investment position: fourth quarter of 2025' — net assets of EUR 1.76 trillion = 11.0% of euro area GDP. EA is roughly balanced / small net creditor.
_flags: iNFA (imputed return on NFA, ~3% p.a.) and fxShare (FX-exposed NFA share, ~0.4) are MODELING DEFAULTS shipped flagged (like the structural SFA), NOT estimated/sourced.
